title: The Defensive Playbook Isn’t Your Average Inflation Roadmap
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Inflation strategies often overlook utilities and healthcare sectors for defensive advantages. Historically, these sectors have shown resilience. Current estima
excerpt: Inflation strategies often overlook utilities and healthcare sectors for defensive advantages. Historically, these sectors have shown resilience. Current estimates suggest a higher inflation rate than the historical average.

content.introduction: Inflation strategies often overlook utilities and healthcare sectors for defensive advantages. Historically, these sectors have shown resilience. Current estimates suggest a higher inflation rate than the historical average.
body: Inflation fears are back, but the go-to strategy can add oil and input-cost exposure. Utilities and healthcare may frame a quieter defense.
